text: Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and their latest readings so a comparative read of operational state can be made.
characteristic_form: The answer should list the in-service transformer IDs, then for each of T-005 and T-013 surface the available sensor channels and their most recent readings, and call out any qualitative difference between the two units.
